UserInfoText1.html.en: If you're still grieving from the loss of your Lar Par companion, maybe it's best to do the survey later when you've had time to heal.
UserInfoText1.html._source: If you're still grieving from the loss of your Lar Par companion, maybe it's best to do the survey later when you've had time to heal.

UserInfoText2.html.en: If you'd like to continue now, please tell us your LP companion's name and if they have crossed over the Rainbow Bridge.
UserInfoText2.html._source: If you'd like to continue now, please tell us your LP companion's name and if they have crossed over the Rainbow Bridge.

CmpnName.title.en: Please tell us your companion's name:
CmpnName.title._source: Please tell us your companion's name:

LifeStatus.title.en: Has {CmpnName} crossed over the Rainbow Bridge?
LifeStatus.title._source: Has {CmpnName} crossed over the Rainbow Bridge?

UserInfoText.html.en: We're asking for your first name, which country you live in, and some optional demographics to help us understand the people who are making choices for their beloved LP companions. We also ask for contact info to prevent fake respondents and make sure each respondent is unique and verifiable.
UserInfoText.html._source: We're asking for your first name, which country you live in, and some optional demographics to help us understand the people who are making choices for their beloved LP companions. We also ask for contact info to prevent fake respondents and make sure each respondent is unique and verifiable.

UserInfoVerificationText.html.en:
We contact a random sample of respondents for verification purposes. You may or may not be contacted. You can provide an email address or, if you're more comfortable communicating via Facebook Messenger, you can provide your Facebook account name.

With your consent, we may also contact you to talk in more detail about your experience with LP.
UserInfoVerificationText.html._source:
We contact a random sample of respondents for verification purposes. You may or may not be contacted. You can provide an email address or, if you're more comfortable communicating via Facebook Messenger, you can provide your Facebook account name.

With your consent, we may also contact you to talk in more detail about your experience with LP.

UserInfoContactType.title.en: Would you like to use email or Facebook Messenger for verification?
UserInfoContactType.title._source: Would you like to use email or Facebook Messenger for verification?

UserInfoContactTypeFacebookInstructions..en: Please go to your Facebook account page and copy the URL, then paste it below. Example: https://facebook.com/my.user.name.
UserInfoContactTypeFacebookInstructions.._source: Please go to your Facebook account page and copy the URL, then paste it below. Example: https://facebook.com/my.user.name.

UserInfoContactTypeFacebook.validators.0.en: Please enter a valid Facebook profile URL, e.g., https://facebook.com/your.username
UserInfoContactTypeFacebook.validators.0._source: Please enter a valid Facebook profile URL, e.g., https://facebook.com/your.username

UserInfoContactOK.title.en: May we contact you to talk more about your LP experience?
UserInfoContactOK.title._source: May we contact you to talk more about your LP experience?
